programmes.show_description: Neighborhood Knockouts. Guy Fieri scours the US west coast for funky joints. An all-day breakfast joint serves up creme brûlée French toast and a hot dog spot features lamb merguez. S18, Ep1
Meat Lover's Paradise. Guy Fieri takes a meat-crazed master class with master butchers. He checks out a pastrami-loving eatery serving burgers and cheesesteaks. S18, Ep2
Servin' Up San Francisco. Guy Fieri cruises the San Francisco coast for a diverse culinary road trip. He visits an NY-style deli and a food truck park serving Asian-fusion. S18, Ep3
Cannoli, Fritters, And Wings. Guy Fieri revs up for a festival of flavours! He visits a Guamanian food truck serving shrimp fritters and checks out a family-run comfort food joint. S18, Ep4
Milwaukee, WI. Casey Webb travels to Milwaukee for some epic Brew City eats, including a pitcher-sized Bloody Mary garnished with a whole chicken. S1, Ep1
New York, NY. Casey is in New York City for the best in big city eats. In one challenge, he faces a 151-ounce milkshake, an eight-pound sloppy joe or six habanero ghost chili wings. S1, Ep2
Robots And Rainbow Unicorns. Buddy creates a robot cake for a gala honouring an advanced robot. Plus, Mary helps a five-year old girl's dream for a unicorn birthday cake come true. S9, Ep21
Steampunks, Kiwi Cake, And Babysitting Jitters. The team creates an amazing three-piece steampunk-inspired cake. And Buddy makes a special cake for New Zealanders living in New York. S9, Ep22

Northumberland. James samples the delights of Northumberland, joined by Michelin-starred chef Kenny Atkinson. They learn how mead is made on Holy Island. S1, Ep13
Northumberland. Si and Dave continue their adventure in Northumberland. They eat fresh seafood in the seaside town of Amble and sample the ultimate fish and chips in Bamburgh. S1, Ep6
10 Things I Love About Ladd. Ree makes Ladd's favourite foods. He loves spatchcock BBQ chicken, thin and crispy waffle fries and for dessert spoon cake with gooey chocolate frosting. S22, Ep2
Freezer Food: Tex-Mex. Ree fills her freezer with Tex-Mex favourites. She starts with green chili pork stew, mac and cheese and delicious vegetarian dishes like veggie taco salad. S22, Ep3
Chicken, Salad, Pasta & Shortbread. Jamie starts by cooking up his tasty tikka chicken. Next, he prepares a vibrant carrot and grain salad, and chocolate orange shortbread. S1, Ep7
Sausage Carbonara & One-Pot Thai Chicken. Jamie makes super-fast sausage carbonara with a peppery punch! Then he serves up a spicy one-pot Thai red chicken soup and steamed pudding. S1, Ep8
Good Stuff. For lunch alfresco Ina makes roasted asparagus with prosciutto and Hollandaise. Later, she learns how to make a perfect Porterhouse steak and ends her day with a picnic. S8, Ep2
Eat Like A Local. Ina makes tomato crostini and whipped feta for lunch and learns how to make a local recipe of buttermilk fried chicken. Then, she chooses drinks: spritz or gimlet S8, Ep3
The remaining bakers are asked to make signature savoury parcels, ranging from pasties to wellingtons to samosas and even the beloved Cornish pasty. S5, Ep7
Asked to make enriched sweet fruit loaves for their signature challenge, the bakers must work with soft dough to create works of art for Paul and Mary to critique. S5, Ep8
James Martin takes a road trip to the country that inspired his cooking career. Travelling in Keith Floyd's motor, he creates delicious new recipes in idyllic locations. S1, Ep19
James Martin takes a road trip to the country that inspired his cooking career. Travelling in Keith Floyd's motor, he creates delicious new recipes in idyllic locations. S1, Ep20

Roswell, New Mexico. Casey Webb ventures to Roswell, New Mexico for a UFO-inspired Thanksgiving sandwich. Later, he takes on the undefeated 10-98 challenge! S5, Ep7
Boulder, Colorado. Casey Webb heads to Boulder, Colorado for a bourbon burger blast and campfire classic. Plus, he samples an insanely hot pizza with three layers of ghost pepper. S5, Ep8
Bad Blood. Aarthi Sampath seeks revenge against Carlos Anthony, and Tajahi Cooke confronts his former protégé Daniel Westfall in head-to-head cooking battles. S1, Ep8
Aces Of Authenticity. Guy Fieri seeks out authentic joints. In Santa Fe a Chimayan owner creates traditional dishes like enchiladas and a Portland noodle house uses mum's recipes! S18, Ep5
Sammies And Stew. Guy Fieri digs into super sandwiches and stew! On his travels he visits a café with a native Kenyan cooking up fresh fish and Caribbean goat stew. S18, Ep6
All Kinds Of Gobble Gobble. Guy Fieri checks out various Thanksgiving tastes. A father-son bakery crafts a unique take on the traditional bird and a deli makes turkey wild rice soup. S18, Ep7
Comfort And Soul. Guy Fieri visits eateries that'll warm the palate and the soul, including a funky neighbourhood café and a brewery is serving up soul food with a New Mexico twist. S18, Ep8
Charleston, SC. Casey Webb heads to Charleston, SC, for some epic low country eats. In the Belt Buster Challenge, he must devour a two-pound burger and a huge order of tater tots. S1, Ep3
Sleepy Hollow, NY. Casey Webb visits spooky Sleepy Hollow, New York, where he tries the massive Headless Horseman Burger and takes on the Dawg House Challenge. S1, Ep4
Momma's Day, Floral Flavors And Cake Clinics. It's a busy Mother's Day at the bakery when the team runs out of a key ingredient. Plus, the Valastro clan gathers to celebrate Momma. S9, Ep23
Colour Festival, Sofia's Graduating And A Paint Date. Buddy creates an intricate cake for Sofia's graduation. And, a colourful cake for the Indian Holi festival brightens the bakery. S9, Ep24

All Things New York. Guy Fieri gets a taste of NYC. In Eureka, CA, a Bronx-bred pizza maker brings Neapolitan-style pies. In Queens, a filmmaker-turned-chef serves atomic fireballs. S19, Ep2
Kickin' It In Key West. Guy Fieri visits eateries in Key West, FLA, from a funky little shack serving up New England seafood to a tiny food cart cranking out Asian-Caribbean dishes. S19, Ep6
Island Flavor. Guy Fieri cruises round Hawaii for a taste of Oahu. A tiny cafe serves up modern twists on Hawaiian classics and an authentic Hawaiian drive-in cranks out fresh fish. S19, Ep10
Meat Lover's Paradise. Guy Fieri takes a meat-crazed master class with master butchers. He checks out a pastrami-loving eatery serving burgers and cheesesteaks. S18, Ep2
Fruit All Ways. Ina puts a new twist on fruit classics. She learns about desserts such as French nougatine from chef Laura Donnelly and makes wild rice salad and apple chutney. S7, Ep3
Italian At Home. Ina recreates a Florentine feast in East Hampton. There's a mozzarella master class, Italian drinks tray, shop-bought hors d'oeuvres and baked fish in parchment. S7, Ep4
Eat Your Greens. Ina shares vegetable ideas for every day of the week. She prepares dishes including spring green risotto with and warm mushroom salad. S7, Ep5
The Adventure Begins. Ina and Jeffrey take a trip to California. For the first meal she cooks chicken with wild mushrooms. Later, she makes baked goat cheese and grilled pork chops. S8, Ep1
Off Duty. Ina sees what professional cooks make at home when they're off duty. Recipes include banana raspberry smoothies and kimchi fried rice with fried egg. S7, Ep7
Restaurant Rules. Ina shares restaurant-inspired dishes and secrets from America's best kitchens. On the menu are peas and prosciutto, lemon chicken and skillet brownies. S7, Ep8
With the rising cost of food and energy, Jamie Oliver is on a mission to make delicious dishes that won't break the budget. S1, Ep2
Jamie cooks up his version of steak and onion sandwich and shows his way to cook osso buco. Plus, he makes a sticky toffee pudding with his mum. S1, Ep3
Jamie serves up three comfort food classics: chicken kiev, shepherd's pie and spaghetti alle vongole with a non-traditional pink twist. S1, Ep4
Guernsey. James and his mate Mark Jordan rev up their motorbikes to discover the delights of Guernsey. They sample the local speciality of Gache cake. S1, Ep5
Dorset. James's trip along the south coast continues in Dorset with pal and award-winning chef, Paul Ainsworth. They enjoy a gorgeous beachside barbeque. S1, Ep6
The Bikers offer a taste of Northumberland. This means a celebration of local seafood, a traditional lamb recipe and a new way of serving Si's favourite ice cream. S1, Ep13
The Bikers cook feel-good meals with healthy and delicious recipes. They make a lentil and bacon soup, a chic healthy pudding and a low-fat version of burger and fries. S1, Ep14
Si and Dave prove that homemade can beat shop-bought with their DIY recipes. They make gravlax, jam doughnuts, their own corned beef and an Indian favourite, paneer. S1, Ep15
South Wales. Si and Dave start their new adventure Wales, hunting for unique ingredients to include on the menu of a restaurant intent on winning a Michelin star. S1, Ep1
Gulf Coast. Adam takes a trip along the beautiful Gulf Coast in search of delicious eats. Plus, he coaches a local musician who hopes to defeat the Muffaletta Sandwich Challenge. S1, Ep8
Florida Keys. Adam heads to the Florida Keys, where he takes a sorority member along to compete in the Conch Republic Fritter Contest. Vanilla Ice makes a surprise guest appearance. S1, Ep9
Aberdeen Angus. In Aberdeen, Adam tries Aberdeen Angus at one of the city's finest steak restaurants. Later, he checks out meat pies from an award-winning local butcher. S1, Ep3
Bakewell Pudding. In the Peak District, Adam learns more about the accidental invention of Bakewell pudding. Then, he visits a gastropub for his first taste of local grouse. S1, Ep4
Southeast Standouts. Guy Fieri goes on a tasty tour of the Southeast for a brisket po'boy in Louisiana, shrimp rolls in Florida, and bulgogi cheesesteaks in Atlanta. S41, Ep9
Barbecue, Beignets And Barbacoa. Guy Fieri's diving into brisket injera nachos in Arlington, gluten-free beignets in Naples, and a barbacoa tortilla sandwich in Atlanta. S41, Ep10
All Kinds of Cookin'. Guy Fieri's digging into coffee-dusted venison in Decatur, GA, basil-topped bagels in Lewisville, TX, and lights-out lamb kebabs in Baton Rouge, LA. S41, Ep11
Funky Flavors. Guy Fieri's getting into the funkiest of flavours, like patty melt empanadas in Atlanta, khachapuri in Los Angeles, and BBQ pork bao in Cincinnati. S41, Ep12
